final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic illustration of the Tang Dynasty Chang'an Lantern Festival at night (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: must be 工笔重彩长卷 (meticulous brushwork with heavy colors, handscroll format)
Composition: needs a sweeping panoramic view of 长安城 at night — exact framing and perspective are yours
Subject: must include countless lanterns (万盏花灯) illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: must include Tang Dynasty Chang'an cityscape at night during the Lantern Festival
Lighting/mood: needs a luminous night atmosphere with thousands of lanterns — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, saturated 重彩 direction — exact pigment choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs traditional 工笔 painting surface treatment — exact paper/silk texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve Tang Dynasty era accuracy and lantern festival atmosphere
Avoid:
